tool.name: run_inventory_differential_hunt
tool.description: Use stored runtime inventory plus saved session profiles to automatically run authorization-oriented differential comparisons across the highest-value runtime endpoints.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label whose stored runtime inventory should be hunted.

parameter.name: max_endpoints
parameter.description: Maximum number of runtime endpoint-method combinations to execute in one batch. Default: 10.

parameter.name: min_priority
parameter.description: Minimum endpoint priority to include: critical, high, normal, or low. Default: high.

parameter.name: include_state_changing
parameter.description: Whether to include POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE endpoints. Default: false.

parameter.name: only_unresolved
parameter.description: When true, skip runtime endpoint coverage items already marked covered or not_applicable. Default: true.

parameter.name: host_regex
parameter.description: Optional regex filter applied to runtime inventory hosts.

parameter.name: path_regex
parameter.description: Optional regex filter applied to normalized runtime paths.

parameter.name: profile_names
parameter.description: Optional list of session profile names to restrict the hunt to a known role/tenant set.

parameter.name: similarity_threshold
parameter.description: Body-preview similarity threshold for suspicious parity detection. Default: 0.98.
